final:
module priority_arbiter(
    input [3:0] deny,
    output reg [3:0] grant
);
    always @(*) begin
        grant = 4'b0000; // Default to no grant
        if (deny[0]) grant = 4'b0001; // Grant to deny[0] if it's active
        else if (deny[1]) grant = 4'b0010; // Grant to deny[1] if deny[0] is not active
        else if (deny[2]) grant = 4'b0100; // Grant to deny[2] if deny[0] and deny[1] are not active
        else if (deny[3]) grant = 4'b1000; // Grant to deny[3] if all higher priority are not active
    end
endmodule
